resources.string: Configurable protection against critical battery shutdown
Keeps the phone from shutting down at 0% using LSPosed/System framework. Choose a mode below. Permanent mode may cause data loss if power drops suddenly.
Warning: Permanent mode blocks shutdown continuously. If the battery dies abruptly, you may lose data or corrupt the file system.
Please confirm the risk to enable Permanent mode.

This module can change how your device behaves at critically low battery levels and may prevent a normal shutdown at 0%. This is potentially unsafe. Sudden power loss can cause data loss, file system corruption, and instability.\n\nBy continuing, you confirm that you understand the risks and that you take full responsibility for using this module.
